Sometimes, I feel like I’m always falling short, especially when I see friends or colleagues achieving things I wish I could. It all just makes me question what I’m doing with my life, like I’m somehow missing the mark. It’s a lot to carry.

I want to be proud of my own progress, but it often feels overshadowed by what others are doing.
